feat: add AI image generation to recipe image upload (#347)

Adds useAIImageGeneration hook and integrates a '✨ Generate image'
button into the RecipeFormSteps image upload zone.

- useAIImageGeneration hook manages loading/success/error state
- Button disabled when recipe name is empty
- Shows 'Regenerate image' label when image already set
- Loading spinner during generation
- On success: sets generated image as recipe imagePreview

Closes theandiman/recipe-management#41

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf: borrowed-frame optimization for simple function calls

Skip Arc::clone/drop for code/globals/builtins/constant_cache when
calling simple functions. Instead, bitwise-copy Arcs from the function
object and keep it alive in held_func. Saves 8 atomic operations per
non-recursive function call.

- Added held_func: Option<PyObjectRef> field to Frame
- Added Frame::new_borrowed() constructor using ptr::read
- Updated recycle() to handle held_func before ManuallyDrop
- Updated CallFunction and LoadGlobalCallFunction handlers

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: byte-accurate progress sync to MA UI and Yandex app

Calculate real playback progress from PCM bytes yielded instead of
relying on Ynison state echoes (which arrive every ~5s and don't
reflect actual audio position).

- _bytes_to_ms: converts PCM byte count to milliseconds
- _sync_progress: pushes elapsed to MA metadata + Ynison every 5s
- _update_metadata: skips Ynison-based elapsed when actively streaming
  (byte-based progress is the source of truth during playback)

Formula: real_progress = seek_ms + (bytes_yielded * 1000) / byte_rate

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: PCM frame alignment + seek grace period after track change

Two fixes for the hissing audio bug:

1. PCM frame alignment: When a track stream is interrupted mid-chunk
   (seek, track change), the last yielded chunk may not end on a PCM
   frame boundary. The next track's data starts at byte 0, but MA's
   single ffmpeg sees a continuous byte stream — frame misalignment
   causes hissing/white noise. Fix: pad with silence bytes to the
   next frame boundary after each track's streaming ends.

2. Seek grace period: After a track change, Ynison echoes can report
   stale progress (e.g., progress=0) that the drift-based seek
   detector interprets as a large backward seek (5+ seconds of drift).
   This false seek breaks the active stream mid-track, which then
   triggers bug #1. Fix: 5-second grace period after track change
   during which seek detection is suppressed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add per-song notes for voters with reveal screen display (#26)

Adds tweet-sized (280 char) notes that any voter can attach to any song,
even after voting closes. Notes are shown on the results reveal screen
as entertaining commentary.

### Database
- New `notes` table (migration 007) with unique constraint on `(game_id,
voterName, country)`
- `deleteGame` cleanup extended to include notes

### Data layer & actions
- `getNotesForVoter`, `upsertNote`, `getAllNotes` in `data.ts`
- `submitNote` server action with server-side length enforcement
- `SongResult` extended with `notes: { voter, note }[]`
- Shared `MAX_NOTE_LENGTH = 280` constant

### Voting UI
- `NoteEditor` client component rendered under each song's rating
buttons
- Pure text "✏️ add note" / "✏️ edit note" button, right-aligned with
`pr-2`, min 24×24px tap target
- Edit mode: 2-row textarea with native `maxLength`, char counter,
Save/Cancel
- Saved notes shown as italic text; editor available regardless of game
closed state

### Results reveal
- "💬 Things said about this song:" section per song card, showing
voter-attributed quoted notes

### Voting page with note buttons and saved note

![vote-page](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/86e7397c-defe-42ff-9581-354606d6a051)

### Note editor open

![note-edit](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4b04cb5a-a4e4-4546-8dfa-6f2689c3a9c5)

docs: update README

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(#206): replace stuck ENQUEUED workers on Samsung (#209)

* fix(#206): replace stuck ENQUEUED workers on Samsung

ExistingWorkPolicy.KEEP was preventing re-dispatch of WorkManager workers
that got stuck in ENQUEUED state on Samsung due to aggressive battery
optimization. Now uses REPLACE unless a download is genuinely RUNNING,
ensuring stale ENQUEUED jobs are cancelled and replaced with fresh
requests that get dispatched promptly.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(#206): fix 3 review issues — updateState race, TOCTOU, observer leak

- Move updateState(Downloading()) inside coroutine, conditional on REPLACE policy
  so in-progress download progress isn't reset to 0 when KEEP is chosen
- Move request build + enqueueUniqueWork inside same withContext(IO) block
  to shrink TOCTOU window between WorkInfo snapshot and enqueue call
- Add ConcurrentHashMap<KernelModel, Job> observerJobs + ensureObserving()
  to prevent accumulating observeWorkInfo coroutines on retry-heavy devices

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(#206): use compute() in ensureObserving for atomic check-then-act

ConcurrentHashMap.get() + put() is not atomic — two concurrent
startDownload() calls for the same model could both pass the isActive
check and spawn duplicate observer coroutines. compute() holds the
per-key lock across the entire read-check-and-write, making it atomic.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: NickMonrad <nick@lab3.com.au>

commit.message:
feat(tui): scrollable input — unlimited lines with viewport window

- Remove MAX_INPUT_ROWS hard cap from Shift+Enter and paste insertion;
  buffer now stores unlimited lines
- Add scroll_offset field to InputWidget for viewport tracking
- display_lines() returns only the visible viewport slice (5 rows)
- cursor_position() returns viewport-relative row
- ensure_cursor_visible() keeps cursor within viewport on every mutation
- Render ▲/▼ scroll indicators on input right edge when content overflows
- Reset scroll_offset on clear (Ctrl+U), submit, and completion accept
- Eliminate all early returns in handle_key for consistent scroll updates
- Update 2 tests for new unlimited behavior, all 378 tests pass

commit.message:
fix(ci): move JDK tool to Test stage only to avoid pipeline startup failure

tools{} at pipeline level fails to start if the tool is not yet
configured in Jenkins. Moving it to stage level means only the
Test stage fails (gracefully) until JDK-25 is configured.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add admin pages: Social, Settings, Analytics

- admin/social/index.html: Social post generator with 5 templates (Daily Update EN/AR,
  Price Alert, Weekly Summary, Milestone, UAE Arabic), live gold price fetch,
  platform tabs (X/Twitter, Instagram, WhatsApp, LinkedIn), char counters,
  post history (gp_post_history, max 50), custom post section, copy/share actions.

- admin/settings/index.html: Full settings panel backed by gp_settings in localStorage.
  Sections: Commerce (margin %, VAT, WhatsApp number), Site Identity (name, tagline,
  social links), Feature Toggles (CSS pill switches), API Keys (password fields with
  eye toggle), Admin Notes. Sticky save bar with export/import JSON, reset to defaults
  (inline confirm), last-saved timestamp, input validation.

- admin/analytics/index.html: Analytics dashboard reading gp_analytics_events from
  localStorage. Summary stat cards (page views, unique sessions, most viewed page, API
  success rate), 14-day CSS bar chart, top-10 pages table, recent 30 events table with
  event-type color badges, export/clear data management, empty state with onboarding
  explanation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf: switch to mimalloc global allocator

mimalloc provides thread-local free lists and compact metadata, dramatically
reducing allocation overhead for small objects (Rc<PyObject> = 56 bytes).

Key improvements (arch probe, before → after):
- alloc_dict_empty: 0.0398 → 0.0140 (2.84x faster)
- alloc_list_small: 0.0298 → 0.0136 (2.19x faster)
- refcount_deep:    0.0979 → 0.0440 (2.23x faster)
- dispatch loop:    ~2x faster across all dispatch probes

bench_suite: 17 wins, 4 ties, 4 losses vs CPython (was 14/4/7)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ci): add JDK-25 tool to pipeline and remove duplicate pom deps

- Add tools { jdk 'JDK-25' } to Jenkinsfile.api so Jenkins uses
  the configured JDK 25 instead of the agent default JDK
- Remove duplicate spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test and
  spring-boot-starter-data-mongodb-test entries from pom.xml
  (BOM-managed versions without explicit version tag were duplicates)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(tui): multi-line paste support + brighter input text

- Enable crossterm bracketed paste (EnableBracketedPaste) so pasted
  multi-line text arrives as Event::Paste(String) instead of individual
  key events that would trigger premature submit on Enter
- Handle Event::Paste by normalizing CR→LF and inserting via new
  InputWidget::insert_text() method (respects MAX_INPUT_ROWS cap)
- Fix input text too faint: Color::White → Color::Rgb(255,255,255) + BOLD
  (terminal Color::White maps to dim gray on many dark themes)
- Disable bracketed paste on teardown to restore terminal state
- 5 new tests for insert_text (single-line, multi-line, CR, cap, cursor)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
